{"code":"(def issues-by-id (into {} (map (fn [i] [(:id i) i]) linear-issues-flat)))

(def result-prs
  (filter
    (fn [pr]
      (let [lid (:closes_linear pr)
            iss (get issues-by-id lid)]
        (and iss (not= (:state iss) "done"))))
    prs-with-linear-vec))

(def result-pairs (map #(select-keys % [:number :closes_linear]) result-prs))
